channel.title: Unreal Basics on Aaron Kemner
channel.description: Recent content in Unreal Basics on Aaron Kemner

item.title: TechAnim in Unreal: AnimInstance and AnimationBlueprint
TechAnim in Unreal: AnimNotify and AnimNotifyState
item.description: Among the most powerful tools that Unreal Engine offers out-of-the-box are AnimNotifies and AnimNotifyStates. These two features allow us to execute any logic we might want at a specific point in an animation. That might be firing of VFX at the feet of our character each time they take a step, or playing an audio cue while they are charging up an attack, or something else entirely. They are one of the most-used ways of having animation directly interface with the rest of the game and I can pretty much guarantee you that any Unreal Engine Project of quality uses them in some capacity.
